jp.title: Googleも挫折した「血糖値ガジェット」の難しさ

jp.title: 死にゆく「炭素星」の化学組成

world.title: Artists lift the lid on Cork treasure trove at Fota House
world.description: Containers, boxes, trunks and suitcases have opened up ideas for a summer display with a difference, writes Eve Kelliher

world.title: After 10 years of MAID, key report on mental illness expansion nears
world.description: The extension is set to happen in March 2027, after it was delayed three times by the previous Liberal government, the last time being in February 2024.

world.title: Extreme cold, rainy weather expected
world.description: TEMPERATURES in the south are expected to drop significantly, with snowfall predicted in some southern areas on Wednesday.

world.title: Stolen felines reunited with owners after Vietnam cat-meat bust
world.description: HANOI — More than 40 abducted cats have been reunited with owners after Vietnamese police busted a feline theft ring and rescued 400 pets destined to be slaughtered for food, an animal rights group said on Tuesday.

world.title: Tom Holland explains why Lamine Yamal 'would make a great Spider-Man' as Hollywood actor assesses Spain's World Cup chances
world.description: Tom Holland backs Barcelona star Lamine Yamal as a future Spider-Man while discussing Spain's 2026 World Cup campaign and Julian Alvarez.

world.title: Gatchalian urges all senators to attend special session
world.description: ACTING Senate President and Senate President Pro Tempore Sherwin Gatchalian on Tuesday called on all senators to attend the special session scheduled for June 17, emphasizing the need to pass pending measures and confirm the appointments of five military generals whose confirmations have been delayed.

world.title: CBC will no longer show NHL games as sublicense with rights-holder Rogers Sportsnet ends
world.description: The NHL will no longer be shown on CBC after it and national rights-holder Rogers Sportsnet were unable to come to agreement on a new sublicensing deal that would have allowed the public broadcaster to air games on its Saturday program Hockey Night in Canada.
